cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
1. Steam Launch Option:

PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%

2. Command Line: protontricks 23420 - 

Install D3D9

... after that, runs flawlessly, just like CK2 or EUIV etc.
title: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition

notes: Works with PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% and installing d3dx9 with protontricks, but it seems to crash very easily.
title: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition

title: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition

cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Dismiss my previous 'borked' report. It was referring to EU Rome "Vae Victis" (no longer available & won't run with these tricks). Gold version runs perfectly fine and stable after reported tweaks (see below). Steam/Proton DOES auto-install DirectX on first start, but you STILL HAVE TO install DX9 via Protontricks to run the game.
title: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition

cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Works with PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% and installing d3dx9 - It DOES occasionally crash, when you start a new game, clicking on  a province. After a restart and clicking the same thing again, game WILL start & work thereafter. //Multiplayer not tested.
title: Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition
